content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule in `geomconf_9158.xyz`, I can identify the neighbors of atom index 7 (Nitrogen, N:7).

Looking at the structure, atom N:7 is part of a five-membered ring. It is covalently bonded to:
- Carbon atom with index 1 (C:1)
- Carbon atom with index 6 (C:6)

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 7 are:
- Index: 1, Element: C
- Index: 6, Element: C

The geomconf_index is **9158**.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 7 (element: N). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
